# connectPeer(_:withNearbyConnectionData:)

**Instance Method**

Call this method to connect a peer to the session when using your own service discovery code instead of an  `MCNearbyServiceBrowser` or `MCBrowserViewController` object.

## Declaration

```swift
func connectPeer(_ peerID: MCPeerID, withNearbyConnectionData data: Data)
```

## Parameters

- **peerID**: The peer ID object obtained from the nearby peer.
- **data**: The connection data object obtained from the nearby peer.

## Discussion

Call this method to connect to peers when you are using your own service discovery code instead of an `MCNearbyServiceBrowser` or `MCBrowserViewController` object. For more information, see the [doc://com.apple.multipeerconnectivity/documentation/MultipeerConnectivity/MCSession#Managing-Peers-Manually] section in the overview of the `MCSession` class reference.

## Managing Peers Manually

- **cancelConnectPeer(_:)**: Cancels an attempt to connect to a peer.
- **connectedPeers**: An array of all peers that are currently connected to this session.
- **nearbyConnectionData(forPeer:withCompletionHandler:)**: Obtains connection data for the specified peer.
